---
id: get-context-version-context-context-versions-version-get
title: "Get a specific context version"
description: "Return the context for the given version string (e.g. 'v1', 'v2')."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a specific context version"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/context/context/versions/{version}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Return the context for the given version string (e.g. "v1", "v2").

HTTP 404 — version not found.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
